legend:
  ^  Public API: What external callers depend on.
  ii Auth: JWT issuance and validation.
  ii Routing: Request dispatch and middleware.
  ii Storage: Postgres and Redis access layer.
  _  Runtime: Python 3.12, FastAPI, asyncio.

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── built with _ii^ ──
